/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/demo_basic.dir/demo_basic.cpp.o -o demo_basic  ../src/libcore.a ../src/libui.a ../src/librender.a ../src/libcore.a ../src/libplatform.a -framework AppKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreGraphics -framework Foundation
